patches.hypothesis: The refined solution fixes the overfitting issue by adding more robust null checking and boundary condition handling to handle edge cases not covered by tests. It also avoids the overfitting patterns identified by ensuring that the logic is general and correct, not test-specific.
patches.original_hypothesis: The error is caused by the absence of a null check in the translate method, which leads to an index out of bounds exception when the input string contains a surrogate pair.
